## Problem

What observable problem does this PR solve? Link the issue when one exists.

## Cause and approach

Describe the verified cause and why this approach applies beyond one document or fixture.

## Validation

List the tests, benchmarks, and manual checks performed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] Tests or measurable evidence cover the behavior change.
- [ ] Core builds remain independent from optional platform dependencies.
- [ ] New models/data include immutable sources, checksums, and license notes.
- [ ] No private documents, model binaries, build output, or runtime artifacts are committed.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and limitations are documented.
